evals.prompt: Convert the provided ADF EO XML for InventoryEO and matching SQL DDL into a Spring Boot entity. The table has a composite key on PRODUCT_ID and WAREHOUSE_ID, uses NUMBER and DATE columns, and references ProductEO and WarehouseEO through associations.
evals.expected_output: A JPA entity plus separate IdClass with Jakarta imports, correct numeric/date mappings, and relationship annotations aligned to the descriptor.

evals.prompt: Generate a Spring entity from an ADF descriptor for CountryEO where the SQL trigger uses sequence S_COUNTRIES_ID and the table defines COUNTRY_CODE as VARCHAR2(2) NOT NULL. Keep the package name com.example.demo.model.
evals.expected_output: A single entity class with Lombok, sequence-based id generation, correct @Column metadata, and validation annotations for required fields.
